proof_artifacts.title: Skylark launch-readiness demo package
proof_artifacts.summary: Local, reviewable proof that Skylark 1.0 is launch-ready: deterministic demo build, smoke check, and a review doc tied to the submission checklist.
capabilities: Walks the full journal-entry and forecast loop on synthetic weather fixtures
Replays the C002 units-toggle fix from playtest round one
Shows the one-time pricing screen exactly as frozen in the store listing
limitations: Weather fixtures are deterministic and synthetic, not live provider data
No store API connection; submission remains a manual step
Demo build skips the opt-in crash reporter
proof_artifacts.approval_boundary: Read-only proof package. Reviewing or running it approves nothing; store submission and any pricing change still require their own review packets.
proof_artifacts.next_action: Keep the package current through TASK-044 and TASK-050; re-run the smoke check after any launch-week fix.

proof_artifacts.title: Docs quickstart walkthrough package
proof_artifacts.summary: Screen-by-screen capture of the rewritten 1.0 quickstart so the docs can be judged on visible proof instead of memory.
capabilities: Replays the 1.0 first-run flow against the rewritten quickstart steps
Flags any doc step whose screenshot no longer matches the build
limitations: Covers the quickstart only, not the full guide set
Captured against the release-candidate build, not the store build
proof_artifacts.approval_boundary: Read-only capture. Publishing docs changes to ridgeline.example still requires an external_write review packet.
proof_artifacts.next_action: Finish the capture after TASK-061 screenshots land, then run the smoke check.

proof_artifacts.title: Beta survey results packet
proof_artifacts.summary: Aggregated round-one survey packet: response tables, habit split, pricing signal, and the request ranking that feeds the v1.1 scope draft.
capabilities: Rebuilds every summary table from the raw response export deterministically
Cross-checks the pricing signal against the decision worksheet
limitations: Aggregates only; individual responses stay out of the packet by design
proof_artifacts.approval_boundary: Read-only report. Promoting survey insights to memory claims requires a memory_write review packet.
proof_artifacts.next_action: Hold as the evidence base for TASK-080 v1.1 scoping.
